name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Workbench Specification Policy
governing_principle: A specification may define the workbench's shape. It must not become the workbench.
boundary_principle: The first workbench specification must preserve refusal, uncertainty, and artifact boundaries before it describes any user-facing experience.
specification_definition: Non-operational governance-to-design contract describing future workbench modules, flow, output envelopes, refusal checkpoints, state transitions, boundary guardrails, and non-authorization requirements.
specification_non_purpose: Does not create interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, routes, sitemap expansion, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, custom domain launch, or public tool.

non_authorization_rules.statement: Specification layer does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, custom domain launch, or public tool behavior.
